workspace.createDesc: Create an empty workspace; AI names it after setup.
workspace.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this workspace? This action cannot be undone.
workspace.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter description (default: No description if empty)...
workspace.noWorkspacesDesc: Create your first workspace to get started!
workspace.recentHint: Recent study spaces stay within reach.
workspace.createHint: Start setup to get a fitting name.
workspace.subject: Subject

community.title: Shared learning spaces
community.subtitle: Discover personal and group workspaces that are being cloned the most, then turn them into your own private study workspace.
community.shareError: Unable to share this item right now.
community.cloneSuccess: Personal workspace created from the community share.
community.cloneError: Unable to clone this community share right now.
community.emptyDescription: No extra description was provided for this share.
community.empty: No community shares yet. Share a workspace to seed the feed.

groupHub.title: Find a group that matches how you want to study
groupHub.subtitle: Open the QuizMate AI group community to review the shared goal, learning rhythm, and the sections each group already has before you decide to join.
groupHub.emptyDescription: Once public groups are available, you will be able to review them and join directly from here.
groupHub.emptyCardDescription: This group has not added a short description yet.
groupHub.noResultsDescription: Try a different keyword based on the goal, domain, or exam target.
groupHub.requirementsTitle: What this group is looking for
groupHub.fallbackNeed: Best suited for the {{role}} role with a {{mode}} rhythm.

emptyPreview.goal: The study goal and shared direction of each group
emptyPreview.sections: The core sections inside the group such as roadmap, quiz, materials, and discussion
emptyPreview.join: A direct join action when the group is open to the community

messages.long: It has been more than a month since we last saw you. We hope QuizMate AI still fits your study flow, even if life got busy for a while. Whenever you are ready, we are still here for you.
messages.mid: It has been a while since your last visit. Knowledge can fade if you leave it untouched for too long, but that is okay — we can reconnect your learning flow right now.
messages.short: It has been a little while. Your study path is still here waiting for you.

welcomeBackModal.inactiveLine: {{name}}, it has been {{count}} days since your last visit.
welcomeBackModal.resumeCardEyebrow: Before your break, you were learning
welcomeBackModal.resumeCardHint: We can suggest a short quiz to help you check what still feels familiar. Want to try?
welcomeBackModal.emptyCardTitle: Is QuizMate AI working well for you?
welcomeBackModal.emptyCardBody: Try creating a new study roadmap. We have personalized the experience much more since your last visit.

profile.materialRequired: Please select at least one material.
